---
title: false
pagetitle: "Tools | Mesfin Genie"
page-layout: full
description: "Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation tools developed by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<main id="main-content">
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><h1>Tools</h1><p>Interactive applications for policy design and economic evaluation.</p></div></header>
<section class="section"><div class="page-shell tool-page-grid">
  <article class="tool-page-card reveal"><div class="tool-topline"><span>Vaccine policy · Version 4.4.1</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div><h2>eMANDEVAL Future</h2><p>Compares prospective vaccine-mandate designs using predicted public support, expected lives saved, benefit-cost outcomes and policy trade-offs.</p><dl class="tool-credit"><div><dt>Developer</dt><dd>Mesfin Genie</dd></div><div><dt>Research programme</dt><dd>MandEval</dd></div></dl><a class="button-primary" href="/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/" target="_blank">Launch eMANDEVAL ↗</a></article>
  <article class="tool-page-card reveal"><div class="tool-topline"><span>Farm economics · Version 2026.18</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div><h2>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h2><p>Evaluates farm practices and soil-management interventions using net present value, benefit-cost ratio, return on investment and sensitivity analysis.</p><dl class="tool-credit"><div><dt>Publisher and developer</dt><dd>Dr Frank Wogbe Agbola</dd></div><div><dt>Co-developer</dt><dd>Mesfin Genie</dd></div><div><dt>Project</dt><dd>CRC High Performance Soils Project 1.2.008</dd></div></dl><a class="button-primary" href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank">Launch SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool ↗</a></article>
</div></section>
</main>
```
